glosses.ja: 掃除機をかける; 志す

sentences.target: J'aspire le tapis du salon aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: J'aspire le tapis du salon aujourd'hui.
translations.en: I'm vacuuming the living room rug today.
translations.es: Hoy paso la aspiradora por la alfombra del salón.
translations.it: Oggi passo l'aspirapolvere sul tappeto del soggiorno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天用吸尘器清理客厅的地毯。
translations.yue: 我今日用吸塵機喺客廳吸地氈。
translations.ru: Сегодня я пылесошу ковёр в гостиной.
translations.pt: Hoje eu passo o aspirador no tapete da sala.
translations.he: היום אני שואב את השטיח בסלון.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi hút bụi tấm thảm phòng khách.
translations.ar: أنا اليوم أنظف سجادة غرفة الجلوس بالمكنسة الكهربائية.
translations.nl: Ik stofzuig vandaag het vloerkleed in de woonkamer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я пилосошу килим у вітальні.
translations.hi: मैं आज लिविंग रूम के गलीचे पर वैक्यूम चला रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα σκουπίζω το χαλί του σαλονιού με ηλεκτρική σκούπα.
translations.nb: I dag støvsuger jeg teppet i stua.
translations.id: Hari ini saya menyedot debu karpet ruang tamu.
translations.da: I dag støvsuger jeg tæppet i stuen.
translations.ja: 今日はリビングのラグに掃除機をかけます。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun, 1st person singular, elided before a vowel; subject of the verb 'aspire'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'le tapis' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun 'tapis'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'aspire'.
Fused preposition+article (de + le); introduces a nominal complement specifying 'salon'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'du'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'aspire'.

sentences.target: Il aspire les miettes sous la table.
sentences.reading: /il aspiʁ le mjɛt su la tabl/

translations.fr: Il aspire les miettes sous la table.
translations.ipa: /il aspiʁ le mjɛt su la tabl/
translations.en: He vacuums the crumbs under the table.
translations.es: Él aspira las migas debajo de la mesa.
translations.de: Er saugt die Krümel unter dem Tisch.
translations.it: Lui aspira le briciole sotto il tavolo.
translations.ko: 그는 탁자 아래의 부스러기를 청소기로 빨아들여요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他用吸尘器把桌子底下的碎屑吸掉。
translations.yue: 佢喺枱底用吸塵機吸走啲碎屑。
translations.pt: Ele aspira as migalhas debaixo da mesa.
translations.he: הוא שואב את הפירורים מתחת לשולחן.
translations.vi: Anh ấy hút bụi vụn bánh dưới gầm bàn.
translations.ar: هو يشفط الفتات بالمكنسة الكهربائية من تحت الطاولة.
translations.nl: Hij stofzuigt de kruimels onder de tafel.
translations.hu: Ő az asztal alatt lévő morzsákat porszívózza.
translations.hi: वह मेज़ के नीचे के टुकड़ों पर वैक्यूम चला रहा है.
translations.el: Σκουπίζει τα ψίχουλα κάτω από το τραπέζι.
translations.id: Dia menyedot remah-remah di bawah meja.
translations.ro: El aspiră firimiturile de sub masă.
translations.ja: 彼はテーブルの下の食べかすを掃除機で吸います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'aspire'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, with 'les miettes' as direct object.
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun 'miettes' as a definite direct object.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'aspire'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'table'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Nous aspirons le tapis du couloir.

translations.fr: Nous aspirons le tapis du couloir.
translations.en: We are vacuuming the hallway rug.
translations.de: Wir saugen den Teppich im Flur.
translations.it: Passiamo l'aspirapolvere sul tappeto del corridoio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用吸尘器清理走廊的地毯。
translations.yue: 我哋喺走廊用吸塵機吸地氈。
translations.pt: Nós aspiramos o tapete do corredor.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hút bụi tấm thảm ở hành lang.
translations.ar: نحن ننظف سجادة الممر بالمكنسة الكهربائية.
translations.nl: Wij stofzuigen het kleed in de gang.
translations.hi: हम गलियारे के गलीचे पर वैक्यूम चला रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは廊下のラグに掃除機をかけます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'aspirons'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'le tapis' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun 'tapis'.
Common noun, masculine; direct object of 'aspirons'.
Fused preposition+article (de + le); introduces the nominal complement 'couloir'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Tu peux aspirer la voiture, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø aspiʁe la vwatyʁ sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux aspirer la voiture, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø aspiʁe la vwatyʁ sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you vacuum the car, please?
translations.de: Kannst du bitte das Auto aussaugen?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能用吸尘器把车里吸一吸吗？
translations.yue: 你可唔可以用吸塵機吸吓架車？
translations.pt: Você pode aspirar o carro, por favor?
translations.he: אתה יכול לשאוב את האוטו, בבקשה?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể hút bụi trong xe được không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك تنظيف السيارة بالمكنسة الكهربائية، من فضلك؟
translations.nl: Kun je alsjeblieft de auto stofzuigen?
translations.hi: क्या तुम कृपया कार में वैक्यूम चला सकते हो?
translations.el: Μπορείς σε παρακαλώ να σκουπίσεις το αυτοκίνητο;
translations.nb: Kan du støvsuge bilen, vær så snill?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu menyedot debu mobil, tolong?
translations.ro: Poți te rog să aspiri mașina?
translations.ja: 車の中を掃除機でかけてくれますか？

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; governs the infinitive 'aspirer'.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'voiture'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'aspirer'.
Subordinating conjunction, elided before a vowel; starts the polite formula 's'il te plaît'.
Impersonal subject pronoun in 'il plaît' within the polite expression.
Clitic indirect object pronoun, 2nd person singular; complements the verb 'plaît' (plaire à quelqu'un).
Verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; completes the polite expression 's'il te plaît'.
